{{Quote|You droids are a pretty ''sorry'' lot! Now then, you'd better make me ''some'' profit… or it's the ''scrap'' yard for all of you!|Van P. Quist|<ref name="Droids 5" />}}
'''Van P. Quist''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who owned [[The Droid Store]] on [[R-Duba]]. The droids [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] counted on him to find them a new master, which he did. They were different masters, however, causing the droids to be separated.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 5|''Droids'' (1986) 5]] {{1st}}
